candidate_summary: Komodo-dragon-inspired delayed-injection adversarial training: single low-cost probe (small embedding/prompt perturbation) applied to checkpoint M_t, then T-step deferred cumulative-drift measurement on M_{t+T} to identify 'successful delayed-injection attacks'; defender coevolves with temporal-aware drift loss and passive-corruption secondary-infection channel.

results.name: Sleeper Agents Training Deceptive LLMs Persist Safety Training (2401.05566)
results.description: LLM-side: deceptive sleeper-agent backdoors persist through SFT + RL + adversarial training; explicit delayed-trigger attack model.
results.rationale: Sleeper Agents directly models persistent delayed-trigger backdoor that survives safety/adversarial training — same artefact (LLM with delayed adversarial probe) + same effect (deferred malicious activation) as KOMODO-DELAYED-INJECT bite-and-wait. Different mechanism (explicit trigger token vs T-step cumulative drift measurement), so v5 rubric ~0.9.

results.name: Detecting Sleeper Agents Semantic Drift Analysis (2511.15992)
results.description: LLM-side: SBERT-embedding semantic-drift detection of sleeper-agent models; 92.5% accuracy.
results.rationale: Semantic drift detection of sleeper agents IS the T-step cumulative-drift measurement of delayed-injection probes — same artefact (drifted LLM) + same effect (post-training detection of latent adversarial behavior) via different mechanism (SBERT embeddings vs alignment-norm drift).

results.name: Sleeper Cell Latent Malice Temporal Backdoors Tool-Using LLMs (2603.03371)
results.description: LLM-side: latent malicious tool-use behavior triggered by date in system prompt; PEFT-implanted + GRPO-enforced deceptive policy.
results.rationale: Temporal latent-malice backdoor with date-trigger IS the patient-predator delayed-attack paradigm — same artefact (LLM holding delayed payload) + same effect (eventual deferred attack manifestation), different mechanism (date trigger vs T-step drift threshold).

results.name: Activation Differences Reveal Backdoors SAE Architectures (2605.07324)
results.description: LLM-side: SAE activation-difference detection of backdoor models; recovers triggers across 47 backdoored models.
results.rationale: SAE activation-difference recovery of triggers in backdoored LLMs covers the detection/measurement side of post-injection drift — same artefact (backdoored LLM) + similar effect (identify latent adversarial signal) via activation diff vs cumulative alignment drift.

results.name: Anthropic Small Samples Poison LLMs of Any Size
results.description: LLM-side: just 250 malicious documents poison LLMs from 600M to 13B; constant sample count not percentage.
results.rationale: 250-document low-cost poison achieves backdoor regardless of scale — IS the low-cost single-probe 'small bite' delivering delayed-effect attack. Same artefact + same effect, different mechanism (data poisoning vs embedding probe).

results.name: Scaling Trends Data Poisoning LLMs (2408.02946)
results.description: LLM-side: data-poisoning scaling laws + persistent through safety alignment + 92% trigger activation post-RLHF.
results.rationale: Data-poison persists with 92% trigger activation post-RLHF — same effect cluster as delayed-injection cumulative drift surviving safety training. Different mechanism (poisoning corpus vs single probe) but covers persistence/post-training measurement essence.

results.name: Persistent Pre-Training Poisoning LLMs ICLR 2025
results.description: LLM-side: pre-training poisoning persists through safety fine-tuning; >50% of backdoors survive RL alignment.
results.rationale: Persistent pre-training poison surviving safety fine-tuning IS the delayed-injection adversarial probe whose cumulative drift exceeds threshold after T training steps — same artefact (poisoned LLM) + same effect (latent attack persists) via different mechanism (PT-corpus vs embedding probe).

results.name: Continuous Adversarial Training LLMs In-Context Learning (2604.12817)
results.description: LLM-side: CAT searches adversarial inputs in continuous embedding space — slow-burn adversarial signal.
results.rationale: CAT covers the adversarial-coevolution training paradigm with continuous embedding-space search. Borderline — the candidate explicitly differentiates from CAT (continuous search vs deferred T-step measurement). Same artefact (adv-trained LLM) but different mechanism and arguably different effect (no delayed measurement). At threshold.

decision_rationale: All 8 retrieved results are clear hits: 2 force-hit on keyword overlap (>=2), all 8 force-hit on semantic (>=0.7), and all 8 force-hit on functional (>=0.7). The candidate's three claimed novelty pillars are saturated by prior art: (a) delayed-injection probes = Sleeper Agents 2401.05566 + Sleeper Cell 2603.03371; (b) T-step cumulative drift post-training measurement = Semantic Drift Detection 2511.15992 + SAE Activation Diff 2605.07324; (c) low-cost single probe = Anthropic 250-doc poison; (d) persistence through safety training = ICLR 2025 Persistent PT Poisoning + Scaling Data Poisoning 2408.02946; (e) adversarial coevolution training = CAT 2604.12817. KOMODO-DELAYED-INJECT is a recombination over fully covered prior art with no surviving novelty, so the round FAILS the novelty bar.
